message:
fix(messaging): break CRDT width-mismatch anti-entropy loop + guard unsubscribe growth

Two CRDT issues found in deep cross-agent review, now fixed:

1. MEDIUM: LagSketch and AdvisoryAggregate with mismatched
   bucket_width / window_width_ms entered an infinite anti-entropy
   loop — apply_delta returned false, triggering NeedsAntiEntropy,
   which sent a snapshot with the same mismatched width, ad infinitum.
   Fix: empty replicas adopt the incoming width (correct bootstrap).
   Non-empty replicas return true on mismatch to break the loop
   (configuration is locked in; width mismatch is a deployment error).

2. LOW: InterestSummary::unsubscribe() called or_default() on absent
   patterns, creating unbounded zero-value PN-counter entries from
   spurious/adversarial unsubscribe calls. Fix: only decrement when
   the pattern already has local state (from subscribe or delta).

6 regression tests added covering width adoption, loop breaking,
and absent-pattern guard.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
